choices.text: RTG (Pu-238 decay → thermocouples → electricity). 5-300W; lasts 30+ years. Voyager, Cassini, Curiosity, New Horizons. Solar 1/r² fails beyond Mars (Jupiter only 50 W/m²).
Only radiation (IR to space) + conduction (internal). MLI blankets insulate; radiators reject heat; heaters protect cold-sensitive. Sun-pointing simpler. JWST 50K passive + 7K cryocooler.
Star trackers (arcsec) + IMU + Kalman filter for determination. Reaction wheels (conservation of momentum) for actuation; magnetorquers in LEO; thrusters for momentum dump. JWST sub-arcsec.

3 complexes 120° apart (Goldstone, Madrid, Canberra). Always one in view of any deep-space mission. Receives Voyager 24B km. X-band primary deep space; Ka emerging for high-rate; optical/laser future.

4-24 min light delay each way precludes real-time. Daily plan-execute-review: upload sequence → rover executes autonomously → downlink results → plan next sol. Relay via Mars orbiters (MRO/MAVEN/TGO) → DSN.

questions.explanation: Asynchronous ops via relay + pre-programmed sequences.
